overall.description: Gameplay footage from a space simulation game (Star Citizen) showing first-person rover driving across a dark rocky alien planet surface at night, transitioning to third-person spaceship flight in planetary orbit. The clip features high-fidelity graphics with a massive celestial body rising during the ground segment and sweeping atmospheric views from space.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien planet surface with rocky mountainous terrain at night

events.description: massive pale celestial body rises into view from the left, casting soft light across the landscape
abrupt transition from ground rover interior to external spaceship view in orbit

agents.ego_description: piloting a rover across rocky alien terrain at night, following another vehicle with illuminated headlights

notable_agents.action: lead rover driving ahead with headlights on, maintaining distance ahead of ego vehicle

entered.detail: dark jagged rocks and gravel covering the planet surface
silhouetted mountain range forming the horizon line
massive pale celestial body rising into the night sky

segments.scene_description: Driving a rover across a desolate rocky alien landscape at night. The terrain is uneven and dark, with distant mountains silhouetted against the sky. A lead vehicle with bright headlights travels ahead. Around 8 seconds, a massive moon or planet rises dramatically from the left, illuminating the scene with pale light before the scene transitions to space.

scene_state.functional_zone: planetary orbit above alien world with curved horizon

events.description: perspective shifts to third-person view of spaceship flying in high orbit above the planet
text 'Moon Ar...' appears briefly in lower right corner indicating arrival at destination

agents.ego_description: piloting a spaceship in stable orbit above the planet, maintaining course over the curved horizon with blue thrusters firing

entered.detail: curved planetary surface showing landmasses, valleys, and cloud formations below
thin blue atmospheric haze lining the planet's curved horizon against black space
distant stars scattered across the blackness of space above the planet

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to a third-person view of a spaceship flying in orbit high above the planet. The vessel maintains steady flight with blue thrusters glowing, overlooking the curved planetary surface with its atmospheric blue glow and scattered clouds. The scene remains stable as the ship continues its orbital trajectory over the alien world.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous transition from a desolate, nocturnal planetary surface to a sweeping orbital perspective in deep space. It begins with a first-person view from a rover navigating an uneven, rocky landscape at night, following a lead vehicle's bright headlights toward silhouetted mountains. As the journey continues, a massive celestial body rises dramatically from the horizon, bathing the dark terrain in pale light before the perspective shifts upward. The scene then expands into a third-person view of a spaceship gliding through the vacuum of orbit, its blue thrusters glowing against the darkness. Finally, the camera stabilizes as the vessel maintains its trajectory, overlooking the curved planetary surface and its atmospheric blue glow.
